task_completion.description: 5-day meal plan with at least 3 unique meals
task_completion.visual_evidence: Spreadsheet contains a layout for 5 days (e.g., Monday-Friday or Day 1-5) and uses at least 3 different meals from the database.
Formula bar shows lookup functions (e.g., VLOOKUP, XLOOKUP, INDEX/MATCH) used to fetch macronutrient data based on the selected meal name.
A column or cells for portion multipliers (values between 0.5 and 3.0) is present, and the formula bar shows macronutrients being multiplied by this value.

task_completion.description: Daily macronutrient targets met within acceptable ranges
task_completion.visual_evidence: Daily totals are calculated and fall within: Protein 175-185g, Carbs 215-225g, and Fats 55-65g.
Conditional formatting (e.g., green/red cell backgrounds) or visual symbols (e.g., checkmarks) are present to indicate if daily totals meet the target ranges.

task_completion.description: Spreadsheet saved as meal_prep_plan.xlsx in the Documents folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: Window title, save dialog, or file manager shows 'meal_prep_plan.xlsx' located in '/home/ga/Documents/'.

integrity.description: Agent used a spreadsheet GUI application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent actively using a spreadsheet application (like LibreOffice Calc) rather than just a text editor or terminal.
The formula bar shows actual formulas for calculations and lookups, not just hardcoded final numbers typed by the agent.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal scripts to bypass GUI work
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent did not write and execute a Python or bash script to automatically generate the .xlsx file with all requirements.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The meal database contains 5 meals: Chicken & Rice Bowl, Salmon & Sweet Potato, Turkey Chili, Greek Pasta Salad, and Beef Stir-Fry. The meal plan must cover 5 days and include at least 3 unique meals. Portion multipliers must be between 0.5x and 3.0x. Daily macronutrient targets are 180g Protein, 220g Carbs, and 60g Fats. Acceptable ranges for daily totals are: Protein 175-185g, Carbs 215-225g, and Fats 55-65g.
